step_rationale: MI biomarker downregulated in STEMI/NSTEMI; cell-surface protein altered in acute myocardial injury.
mechanism: TSPAN33 downregulation in acute MI reflects cardiomyocyte injury and loss of tetraspanin surface expression.

references.title: Plasma Exosomal Proteomics Identifies Differentially Expressed Proteins as Biomarkers for Acute Myocardial Infarction.
